programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: The press paints Christines self-defense shooting of a Hispanic drug-dealer as being racially motivated

programme.title: Starsky 307
programme.desc: Starsky 307

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Dom uses Airwolf to transport a heart to Chicago and responds to a mayday along the way for a downed private plane The plane belongs to billionaire Carl Barron who was on his way to a board meeting when his plane developed engine difficulties Barron attempts to bribe Santini into dropping him off first then the heart Dom refuses and gives Barron a piece of his mind instead Shortly thereafter Barron is killed in a mysterious explosion at his company and everyone at the funeral is shocked to learn that he altered his will just before he died Dominic Santini is named as the recipient of a substantial piece of the Barron fortune and several of Barrons employees are not happy about it

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan race to find an old World Series ring that enables its owner to see gambling results before they happen

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E15
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E15

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Clint Eastwood moves into the neighborhood Mister Ed sets up a party line with his house which causes nothing but problems for Mr Eastwood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: A going-on-15-year-old boy-crazy girl has moved into the neighborhood

programme.title: The RIfleman
programme.desc: The RIfleman

programme.title: Rifleman 427
programme.desc: Rifleman 427

programme.title: Gunsmoke S04E21 Jayhawkers
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S04E21 Jayhawkers

programme.title: Gunsmoke S04E30 Renegade White
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S04E30 Renegade White

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss mentors a lonely mentally challenged man who with superhuman size and strength becomes extremely dangerous when angered These efforts are undermined by a saloon girl who only wants this giant man-child to manipulate him

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After three police officers are murdered Kimble David Janssen the new stranger in town becomes the obvious suspect His situation is complicated by his boss William Shatner a former cop who suffers from a mysterious psychiatric problem

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: A South American citys water supply is threatened by a drum of poison from an overturned truck

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An aging puppeteer suspects his much younger wife has a lover

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick investigates the attack of a vampire novelist by one of her crazed fans

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A police officer uses a deadly sheriffs badge to seek revenge against a mob boss for the murder of his wife

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddys Nightmares

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An Agatha Christie-style mystery sees the inhabitants of a remote hotel terrorized by rumors of a werewolf prowling the area Not to fear as a self-appointed werewolf hunter is amongst them But might he have a dark secret of his own

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When novice driver Kate mistakenly believes that she has damaged the family car her heartfelt efforts to make amends cause the real culprit Grandpa to become increasingly conscience-stricken

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is listed as dead so he can complete a mission

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Inept Max poses as a safe cracker so the Chief orders all federal bank vaults left open

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Stacks help BJs old friend Steven Thomas Ulysses Nathaniel Travis complete the filming of his television pilot Buster Crabbe is outstanding as an aging stuntman with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol decides to give her current beau the boot Ed defends a woman whose employer is suing her and Mike is humiliated when Dr Jerome second guesses him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men must destroy a German anti-aircraft artillery unit so that the Allies can send in a bombing raid on Hitlers birthday

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans have stolen a gold shipment from the French and Hogan must convince Klink to have it moved to the safety of Stalag 13

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Willy is deeply saddened when he receives a letter from his Tennessee girlfriend telling him that she is about to marry another man So McHale and The Crew throw a big Hillbilly Hoe-down to cheer up their heartbroken friend which is attended unexpectedly by a Congressman from the Naval Appropriations Committee

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew are stuck with a spoiled-brat Admirals Son who causes quite a bit of trouble for them noting every violation of Navy regulations for a report to his Father - The Area Commander But McHale is soon fed up with the little jerk and straightens him out with a bit of his own brand of Navy discipline

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After a pay phone spits out 4175 in coins Duke and Frankie are ecstatic about all the fun they can have spending it but good Samaritan Gomer is determined to return it to the phone company

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Duke Slater wins amateur comedy night at the Jade Club Dukes act is impressions with his feature on Sgt Carter the best part of his act Against all common sense and his friends advice Gomer invites Carter to Dukes encore performance

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans body conducts electricity after he is struck by lightning with a bowling ball in his hand But when The Professor tries to remove the bowling ball from Gilligans hand a second lightning strike makes him invisible

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways try to contact two astronauts in a space capsule orbiting over the island but they fail However they may get a second chance when an unmanned capsule they are trying to make contact with lands on the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Grandpa tells Little Luke and his friends an exciting but untrue story about serving with Teddy Roosevelt in the Spanish-American War he is invited to appear as a guest of honor at a public Veterans Day celebration

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When a researcher is kidnapped in a South American country by an old adversary of Jonathans he undertakes to personally deliver the ransom and ensure the safety of the researcher and his pregnant wife

programme.desc: Newhart

programme.title: Newhart - 511

programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper trains Gilligan to be his replacement leader in case he is captured by savages But when The Skipper is actually captured by savages can Gilligan actually take control

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: To catch a killer of a phone-sex operator Ryan has to work undercover as one in spite of her personal abhorrence of the job

programme.title: The Scarlet and The Black
programme.desc: Vatican efforts led by Monsignor Hugh OFlaherty to save Allied POWs and downed Allied airmen as the Nazis invade Rome

programme.title: American Guerrilla In The Philippines
programme.desc: American soldiers stranded in the Philippines after the Japanese invasion form guerrilla bands to fight back

programme.title: Hercules 217

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Using Jiridian technology scientists create a physical bio surrogates where a human consciousness can be transferred When a surrogate escapes they must find it before it uses its fighting and weapons knowledge

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison and the team talk to a psychic woman who studied the aliens after the first invasion Meanwhile a group of aliens take over a family and travel cross country in order to awaken more aliens from hibernation

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A wealthy hunter stalks and wounds a rare hawk for a trophy Afterward the swamp takes Will into its confidence and Will sees the swamp as he never has before

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: The body of a dead man leads Swamp Thing to Arcane and Gen Sunderland

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter the Voyager space probe that has been wandering the cosmos propelled by the Queller drive- a faulty engine system Following the probe is a fleet of alien ships from a world devastated by the drive

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.desc: Daisy learns that Jessi Colter has recorded a song she wrote One problem Wheres the royalties shes due Thats what Bo and Luke try to find out as they infiltrate Hazzard County Commissioner Boss JD Hoggs record piracy operation

programme.title: Wavelength
programme.desc: Two young lovers learn that a small group of child-like space aliens are marooned on Earth and are being held prisoner at a top secret military facility The couple then decide to liberate the extraterrestrial castaways and help them make a rendezvous with a rescue ship sent from the alien home planet

programme.title: Night of the Comet
programme.desc: A comet wipes out most of life on Earth leaving two Valley Girls fighting against cannibal zombies and a sinister group of scientists

programme.title: The Wizard of Speed and Time
programme.desc: A Hollywood filmmaker Mike Jittlov makes a short for an evil film studio Unbeknownest to him the producer has placed a bet of 25000 that he wont come up with anything with a use Luckily our film creator gets the help of his friends

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Nadege Ait-Ibrahim v. Ana Luiza Ferreira.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 21 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. David Swanson v. Matt Zemlak.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Main Event - Sheldon Gaines v. Nate Smandych

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Mike Goehr v. Barrett Thompson.

programme.desc: Minh Pham v. Zack Darling

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chad Anheliger is ready to take on Rick Pfiefer at HK37. Chad is bringing his strong grappling and his natrual ability as a fighter to this match.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Coralie Dixon

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
